name: Quora Business Search
description: Problem-solution and narrative discovery module using Quora. Given a brand, product, or domain query, search Quora (via Google) for relevant questions and threads, then summarize how users talk about pains, desires, alternatives, and objections. Use this whenever a deep analysis needs real user language, objections, and comparisons beyond the official website and owned channels.

query.description: Search query including brand or domain
